title: Alaska SBDC and AEDC on PPP Changes
summary: A number of changes have been made to the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) this week that the Alaska SBDC and Anchorage Economic Development Corporation ( AEDC ) want Alaskans to be aware of. Here’s what is new with an outline of available resources: Mom and Pop Businesses Prioritized ( Vea el comunicado de prensa en español aquí ) B...
